parameters.jsCode:
const contact = $('Process Conversations').first().json;
return [{ json: {
  contact_id: contact.contactId,
  contact_name: contact.contactName,
  contact_email: contact.contactEmail,
  contact_phone: contact.contactPhone,
  health_score: 0,
  health_tier: 'Critical',
  days_since_inbound: -1,
  days_since_outbound: -1,
  messages_last_30d: 0,
  has_active_campaign: false,
  client_initiated_days: -1,
  ai_recommendation: 'No conversation history found. Reach out immediately.'
} }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ contact_id: $json.contact_id, contact_name: $json.contact_name, contact_email: $json.contact_email, contact_phone: $json.contact_phone, health_score: $json.health_score, health_tier: $json.health_tier, days_since_inbound: $json.days_since_inbound, days_since_outbound: $json.days_since_outbound, messages_last_30d: $json.messages_last_30d, has_active_campaign: $json.has_active_campaign, client_initiated_days: $json.client_initiated_days, ai_recommendation: $json.ai_recommendation }) }}
